mapper.sql: aoli.date, aoli.work_card, aoli.employee_id, aoli.working_day_overtime, aoli.rest_day_overtime, aoli.holiday_overtime, aoli.off_hours, aoli.annual_leave, aoli.compassionate_leave, aoli.sick_leave, aoli.marriage_holiday, aoli.maternity_leave, aoli.paternity_leave, aoli.bereavement_leave, aoli.work_related_injury_leave, aoli.id, aoli.create_time, aoli.create_by, aoli.update_time, aoli.update_by,aoli.group_id,aoli.operation_code,aoli.error_msg,aoli.data_status, aoli.family_planning_leave,aoli.public_holiday, aoli.name, aoli.date_str

${tAlias}.date as ${tAlias}_date, ${tAlias}.work_card as ${tAlias}_work_card, ${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_employee_id, ${tAlias}.working_day_overtime as ${tAlias}_working_day_overtime, ${tAlias}.rest_day_overtime as ${tAlias}_rest_day_overtime, ${tAlias}.holiday_overtime as ${tAlias}_holiday_overtime, ${tAlias}.off_hours as ${tAlias}_off_hours, ${tAlias}.annual_leave as ${tAlias}_annual_leave, ${tAlias}.compassionate_leave as ${tAlias}_compassionate_leave, ${tAlias}.sick_leave as ${tAlias}_sick_leave, ${tAlias}.marriage_holiday as ${tAlias}_marriage_holiday, ${tAlias}.maternity_leave as ${tAlias}_maternity_leave, ${tAlias}.paternity_leave as ${tAlias}_paternity_leave, ${tAlias}.bereavement_leave as ${tAlias}_bereavement_leave, ${tAlias}.work_related_injury_leave as ${tAlias}_work_related_injury_leave, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.group_id as ${tAlias}_group_id, ${tAlias}.operation_code as ${tAlias}_operation_code, ${tAlias}.error_msg as ${tAlias}_error_msg, ${tAlias}.data_status as ${tAlias}_data_status, ${tAlias}.family_planning_leave as ${tAlias}_family_planning_leave, ${tAlias}.public_holiday as ${tAlias}_public_holiday, ${tAlias}.name as ${tAlias}_name
mapper.insert: insert into ac_overtime_leave_interface (date, work_card, employee_id, working_day_overtime, rest_day_overtime, holiday_overtime, off_hours, annual_leave, compassionate_leave, sick_leave, marriage_holiday, maternity_leave, paternity_leave, bereavement_leave, work_related_injury_leave, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, group_id,operation_code,error_msg,data_status, family_planning_leave,public_holiday, name ) values (#{date,jdbcType=DATE}, #{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{workingDayOvertime,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{restDayOvertime,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{holidayOvertime, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{offHours,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{annualLeave,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{compassionateLeave,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{sickLeave,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{marriageHoliday,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{maternityLeave,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{paternityLeave,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{bereavementLeave,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{workRelatedInjuryLeave,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} , #{groupId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{operationCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{errorMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR} , #{dataStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{familyPlanningLeave, jdbcType = DECIMAL }, #{publicHoliday, jdbcType = DECIMAL}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

INSERT INTO ac_overtime_leave_interface ( date, date_str, work_card, employee_id, working_day_overtime, rest_day_overtime, holiday_overtime, off_hours, annual_leave, compassionate_leave, sick_leave, marriage_holiday, maternity_leave, paternity_leave, bereavement_leave, work_related_injury_leave, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, group_id,operation_code,error_msg,data_status, family_planning_leave,public_holiday, name ) values
(#{item.date,jdbcType=DATE}, #{item.dateStr,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.employeeId, jdbcType = BIGINT}, #{item.workingDayOvertime,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.restDayOvertime,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.holidayOvertime, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.offHours,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.annualLeave,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.compassionateLeave,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.sickLeave,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.marriageHoliday,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.maternityLeave,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.paternityLeave,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.bereavementLeave,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.workRelatedInjuryLeave,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy ,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} , #{groupId, jdbcType = BIGINT}, 'C', #{item.errorMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR} , 'T', #{item.familyPlanningLeave, jdbcType = DECIMAL }, #{item.publicHoliday, jdbcType = DECIMAL}, #{item.name,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update:
update ac_overtime_leave_interface set date = #{date,jdbcType=DATE}, work_card = #{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, employee_id = #{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, working_day_overtime = #{workingDayOvertime,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, rest_day_overtime = #{restDayOvertime,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, holiday_overtime = #{holidayOvertime, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, off_hours = #{offHours,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, annual_leave = #{annualLeave,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, compassionate_leave = #{compassionateLeave,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, sick_leave = #{sickLeave,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, marriage_holiday = #{marriageHoliday,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, maternity_leave = #{maternityLeave,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, paternity_leave = #{paternityLeave,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, bereavement_leave = #{bereavementLeave,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, work_related_injury_leave = #{workRelatedInjuryLeave,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, group_id = #{groupId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, operation_code = #{operationCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, error_msg = #{errorMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, data_status = #{dataStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, family_planning_leave = #{familyPlanningLeave, jdbcType = DECIMAL}, public_holiday = #{publicHoliday, jdbcType = DECIMAL}, name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
